faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our authentic perfumes and custom blends
faq.a1: Yes, absolutely! We only work with official suppliers and authorized distributors. All our perfumes are 100% original and traceable.
faq.a2: You choose your olfactory family, intensity and format. Our expert creates your unique blend from high-quality ingredients.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), debit cards, contactless payments and cash.
faq.a4: For hygiene reasons, perfumes cannot be returned or exchanged after opening. Custom blends are made especially for you and cannot be returned.
